mapping_description: This mapping loads data from ST_XXCMF_SP_PID_TAN_RELSHP to W_GPF_PLNG_GP_TAN_MPG and exception table EX_XXCMF_SP_PID_TAN_RLNSHP

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
                tvoutput.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY AS GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY
                , tvoutput.TAN_PART_KEY AS TAN_PART_KEY
                , tvoutput.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY AS INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
                , tvoutput.QUANTITY_PER AS QUANTITY_PER
                , COALESCE(tvoutput.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY
                , tvoutput.START_TV_DT AS START_TV_DT
                , COALESCE (MAX(tvoutput.START_TV_DT - INTERVAL '1' DAY) 
                                                OVER (PARTITION BY tvoutput.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,tvoutput.TAN_PART_KEY,tvoutput.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY  
                                                ORDER BY tvoutput.START_TV_DT ASC 
                                                ROWS BETWEEN 1 FOLLOWING AND 1 FOLLOWING)
                                                , DATE '3500-01-01') AS end_date_active
                , tvoutput.action_code AS action_code
                , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY tvoutput.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,tvoutput.TAN_PART_KEY,tvoutput.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY  
                                                                                                                        ORDER BY tvoutput.START_TV_DT ASC) AS rank_index
                , (CASE WHEN rank_index = 1 AND NGPGTMT1.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY IS NOT NULL AND NGPGTMT1.TAN_PART_KEY IS NOT NULL AND NGPGTMT1.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END) AS dml_type
                
                
FROM
                (SELECT
                                                 GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY
                                                ,TAN_PART_KEY
                                                , INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
                                                , QUANTITY_PER
                                               , CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY
                                                                                                                                                                                                , START_TV_DT
                                                                                                                                                                                                , creation_date
                                                                                                                                                                                                , action_code
                                                , exception_type
                                                , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY 
                                                                                                                GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY
                                                                                                                , TAN_PART_KEY
                                                                                                                , INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY 
																												,QUANTITY_PER
																												,CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY
                                                                                                ORDER BY creation_date DESC) AS row_num  
                FROM 
                (
SELECT
                                                NIT.ITEM_KEY AS GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY
                                                ,NIT1.ITEM_KEY AS TAN_PART_KEY
                                                , NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
                                                , QUANTITY_PER
                                                , NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY
                                                                                                                                                                                                , CAST (STXSPTR.creation_date AS date) START_TV_DT
                                                                                                                                                                                                , STXSPTR.creation_date
                                                                                                                                                                                                , STXSPTR.action_code
                                                , 'NE' exception_type

                                FROM
                                                $$STGDB.ST_XXCMF_SP_PID_TAN_RLNSHP  STXSPTR INNER JOIN 
                                                $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO ON
                                                  STXSPTR.SITE = NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE  INNER JOIN
                                                $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NIT ON
                                                 STXSPTR.PID=NIT.BK_PRODUCT_ID  AND
                                                  NIT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY=NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY  INNER JOIN 
                                                $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NIT1 ON
                                                  STXSPTR.TAN_ID=NIT1.BK_PRODUCT_ID AND
                                                 NIT1.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY=NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY LEFT JOIN
                                                 
                                                                                                                                                                                                $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP ON
                                                                                                                                                                                                STXSPTR.BUYER_CODE=NCWP.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS
                               
                                                                                                                                
                        UNION ALL
SELECT
                                                NIT.ITEM_KEY AS GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY
                                                ,NIT1.ITEM_KEY AS TAN_PART_KEY
                                                , NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
                                                , QUANTITY_PER
                                                , NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY
                                                                                                                                                                                                , CAST (EXXSPTR.creation_date AS date) START_TV_DT
                                                , EXXSPTR.creation_date
                                                , EXXSPTR.action_code
                                                , EXXSPTR.exception_type

                                FROM
                                                 $$EXCEPDB.EX_XXCMF_SP_PID_TAN_RLNSHP  EXXSPTR  INNER JOIN 
                                                $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO ON
                                                  EXXSPTR.SITE = NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE  INNER JOIN
                                                $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NIT ON
                                                 EXXSPTR.PID=NIT.BK_PRODUCT_ID  AND
                                                  NIT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY=NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY  INNER JOIN 
                                                $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NIT1 ON
                                                  EXXSPTR.TAN_ID=NIT1.BK_PRODUCT_ID AND
                                                 NIT1.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY=NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY LEFT JOIN
                                                 
                                                                                                                                                                                                $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP ON
                                                                                                                                                                                                EXXSPTR.BUYER_CODE=NCWP.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS
                               

                                                                                                                                
                        UNION ALL
                             SELECT 
                                NGPGTMT.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY
                              , NGPGTMT.TAN_PART_KEY
                              , NGPGTMT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
                              , NGPGTMT.TAN_PER_PRODUCT_CNT
                              , NGPGTMT.BUYER_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY
                                                                                          , NGPGTMT.START_TV_DT
                              , NGPGTMT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM creation_date
                              , 'X' action_code
                              , 'NE' exception_type
                                    FROM
                                                                                                                                $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_GPF_PLNG_GP_TAN_MPG_TV NGPGTMT,
                                                                                                                ( SELECT
                                                NIT.ITEM_KEY AS GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY
                                                ,NIT1.ITEM_KEY AS TAN_PART_KEY
                                                , NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
                                                 , QUANTITY_PER
                                                , NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY
                                FROM
                                                $$STGDB.ST_XXCMF_SP_PID_TAN_RLNSHP STXSPTR  INNER JOIN 
                                                $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO ON
                                                  STXSPTR.SITE = NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE  INNER JOIN
                                                $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NIT ON
                                                 STXSPTR.PID=NIT.BK_PRODUCT_ID  AND
                                                  NIT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY=NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY  INNER JOIN 
                                                $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NIT1 ON
                                                  STXSPTR.TAN_ID=NIT1.BK_PRODUCT_ID AND
                                                 NIT1.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY=NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY 
												 LEFT JOIN
                                                $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP ON
												STXSPTR.BUYER_CODE=NCWP.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS
                        UNION ALL
SELECT
                                                 NIT.ITEM_KEY AS GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY
                                                ,NIT1.ITEM_KEY AS TAN_PART_KEY
                                                ,NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
                                                 , QUANTITY_PER
                                                , NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY
                                FROM
                                                 $$EXCEPDB.EX_XXCMF_SP_PID_TAN_RLNSHP EXXSPTR  INNER JOIN 
                                                $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO ON
                                                  EXXSPTR.SITE = NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE  INNER JOIN
                                                $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NIT ON
                                                 EXXSPTR.PID=NIT.BK_PRODUCT_ID  AND
                                                  NIT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY=NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY  INNER JOIN 
                                                $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NIT1 ON
                                                  EXXSPTR.TAN_ID=NIT1.BK_PRODUCT_ID AND
                                                 NIT1.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY=NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY 
												 LEFT JOIN
                                                 $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP ON
												 EXXSPTR.BUYER_CODE=NCWP.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS
												 
                                                                                                ) INQ
                                                                                WHERE                                                                                                                                 
                                                                                NGPGTMT.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY=INQ.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY
                                                                                AND
                                                                                NGPGTMT.TAN_PART_KEY=INQ.TAN_PART_KEY
                    AND          NGPGTMT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY=INQ.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
                    AND      NGPGTMT.END_TV_DT = CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE)
                                                                                
                                                        AND  
                                                                (INQ.QUANTITY_PER <> NGPGTMT.TAN_PER_PRODUCT_CNT
                                                                 OR 
                                                                 INQ.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY <> NGPGTMT.BUYER_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY  )                                                                                                                                                                                                 
                 ) tvinput
                                QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY                                           GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY
                                                                                                                , TAN_PART_KEY
                                                                                                                , INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY ,START_TV_DT
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                ORDER BY tvinput.creation_date desc) = 1
                ) tvoutput
                LEFT JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_GPF_PLNG_GP_TAN_MPG_TV NGPGTMT1
                ON                                                                         
                                                                                NGPGTMT1.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY=tvoutput.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY
                                                                                AND
                                                                                NGPGTMT1.TAN_PART_KEY=tvoutput.TAN_PART_KEY
                    AND
                                                                                NGPGTMT1.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY=tvoutput.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY   
                                                AND NGPGTMT1.END_TV_DT = CAST('3500-01-01' AS date)
                WHERE tvoutput.row_num = 1

SELECT
PID,
TAN_ID,
DESCRIPTION,
SITE,
EFFECTIVE_IN,
EFFECTIVE_OUT,
QUANTITY_PER,
SUPPLY_PLANNER,
MFG_PLANNER,
BUYER_CODE,
PROD_FAMILY,
BUSINESS_UNIT,
CREATION_DATE,
CREATED_BY,
BATCH_ID,
CREATE_DATETIME,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE 
 
                                FROM
                                                $$STGDB.ST_XXCMF_SP_PID_TAN_RLNSHP  STXSPTR

                                WHERE NOT EXISTS 
																(
								SELECT 1 FROM
								                $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
                                                ,$$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NIT
                                                ,$$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NIT1
									WHERE 				
                                STXSPTR.PID=NIT.BK_PRODUCT_ID
                                AND
                                STXSPTR.TAN_ID=NIT1.BK_PRODUCT_ID
                                AND
                                STXSPTR.SITE = NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE
                                AND
                                NIT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY=NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
                                AND 
                                NIT1.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY=NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
								
								)
